numeric_consistency.verification_basis: Stage41-A values checked against the required-frozen-number reference values supplied for this audit, not against Stage39-C/Stage40-A source reports (those files are absent from the repository).

claim_consistency.result: no forbidden claims found; all allowed claims present

shadow_diagnostic_owner_vs_final_compose.evidence: Executive summary and main result table separate Stage33/36/37/38 (shadow, diagnostic only) from Stage39/40 (final composer)

explicit_opt_in_vs_default_off.evidence: Allowed claims and final interpretation both state composer remains disabled by default

residual_vs_introduced_errors.evidence: Limitations and composer-table note separate residual model errors (Stage35=7, dev=46) from composer-introduced errors (0 in all cases)

synthetic_probe_vs_naturalistic_validati.evidence: Limitations state Stage34/35 are synthetic/probe-style; final recommendation calls for external/naturalistic validation

artifact_index.leakage_warning: Stage35 is a synthetic/probe adversarial set; must remain diagnostic-only, not used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design.

artifact_index.citable_note: citable as a methodology/QA artifact, not as primary experimental evidence

issues: Missing source artifacts: reports/stage39c_safe_structured_v2_dev_report.json, reports/stage39c_safe_structured_v2_stage34_report.json, reports/stage39c_safe_structured_v2_stage35_report.json, reports/stage40a_final_composer_regression_audit.json, and reports/stage40a_final_composer_regression_audit.md do not exist in the repository. Only their generating scripts were committed. Independent numeric verification of Stage41-A against source reports is currently impossible.
warnings: Stage41-A's dev residual support_to_refute = 46 figure is asserted only in Stage41-A's limitations section, with no corresponding entry in the required-frozen-numbers reference list, and cannot be cross-checked against a missing Stage39-C dev source report.

Because the Stage39-C/Stage40-A source reports are absent, any future regeneration of those reports carries latent risk of numeric drift from the currently frozen Stage41-A values; re-audit is recommended once those reports are produced and committed.
recommendation: Treat Stage41-A's numbers as provisionally frozen but not yet independently source-verified. Before citing Stage41-A/Stage39-C/Stage40-A results in a paper or external-facing report, generate and commit the missing Stage39-C and Stage40-A report artifacts (by running the already-committed evaluator scripts) and re-audit against this same numeric-consistency checklist. No claim, boundary, or table issue was found; the only blocking issue is source-artifact completeness.

leakage_policy.description: This is reporting/audit only. Do not use Stage34/35 probes or derived reports for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design. Stage41/42 documents are derived summaries, not new experimental evidence.
